issues.title: Mesh is not watertight (has holes)
issues.description: The model has unknown number of open boundary loop(s). FDM slicers cannot calculate a valid volume, which causes incorrect infill, missing walls, or complete slice failure.
issues.fix: Auto-repair can close most simple holes using pymeshfix.

issues.title: Walls thinner than 0.4mm detected
issues.description: ~100% of sampled surfaces have wall thickness below 0.4mm (minimum for Bambu X1C / X1E). Thinnest detected: 0.00mm. These sections will print as air or collapse mid-print.
issues.fix: Thicken walls to minimum 0.4mm in ZBrush (ZRemesher + Polish) or source app.

issues.title: Heavy overhangs detected (16% of faces)
issues.description: 163,199 faces exceed 45° overhang angle. This model will require significant support structures. Consider reorienting the model or redesigning bridging sections to reduce support material and improve surface quality.
issues.fix: Re-orient model in slicer or use manual supports at critical zones.

issues.title: 2843 floating geometry piece(s) detected
issues.description: Found 2843 disconnected geometry fragment(s) much smaller than the main body. These are likely sculpting artifacts or stray vertices that will print as blobs or be ignored by the slicer unpredictably.
issues.fix: Auto-repair can remove bodies smaller than 1% of total volume.
